# Functional enrichment

::: {.lang-en}
Per-contrast GSEA (primary), ORA (supplementary), TF activity (CollecTRI / ULM), and PROGENy pathway activity. Empty outputs are marked inline.
:::

::: {.lang-ko}
Contrast별 GSEA(1차), ORA(보조), TF 활성도(CollecTRI / ULM), PROGENy pathway 활성도. 빈 출력은 해당 위치에 안내로 표시됩니다.
:::

````{r enr-child-template, include=FALSE}
enr_child_template <- r"---(
## `r cid`

### GSEA

```{r enr-gsea, results='asis', fig.width=9, fig.height=8}
gsea_names <- c(Hallmark     = "gsea_hallmark.csv",
                Reactome     = "gsea_reactome.csv",
                WikiPathways = "gsea_wikipathways.csv",
                PID          = "gsea_pid.csv",
                BioCarta     = "gsea_biocarta.csv",
                CGP          = "gsea_cgp.csv",
                Oncogenic    = "gsea_oncogenic.csv")
gsea_paths <- setNames(
  file.path(project_root, "results", "enrichment", cid, gsea_names),
  names(gsea_names)
)
gsea_list <- lapply(gsea_paths, function(p) safe_read(p))
gsea_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  Filter(function(d) !is.null(d) && nrow(d) > 0, gsea_list),
  .id = "group"
)

# Shorten long pathway names for plot labels only. Full names remain available
# in the DT tables, where the name columns wrap and can be resized.
.trunc_label <- function(x, n = 50) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  ifelse(nchar(x) > n, paste0(substr(x, 1, n - 1), "..."), x)
}

.top_by_direction <- function(df, direction_col = "direction", p_col = "padj", n = 10) {
  if (!all(c(direction_col, p_col) %in% names(df))) return(df[0, , drop = FALSE])
  df |>
    dplyr::filter(.data[[direction_col]] %in% c("up", "down")) |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[direction_col]]) |>
    dplyr::arrange(.data[[p_col]], .by_group = TRUE) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n) |>
    dplyr::ungroup()
}

if (nrow(gsea_all) == 0) {
  cat(as.character(no_results("GSEA returned no enriched sets for this contrast.")))
} else {
  nonempty_grps <- Filter(
    function(g) {
      d <- gsea_list[[g]]
      !is.null(d) && nrow(d) > 0
    },
    names(gsea_list)
  )
  if (is_html_report() && length(nonempty_grps) > 0) {
    cat("\n\n::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n")
  }
  for (grp in nonempty_grps) {
    df <- gsea_list[[grp]]
    cat(sprintf("\n\n#### %s\n\n", grp))
    ranked <- df |>
      dplyr::mutate(direction = dplyr::case_when(
        NES > 0 ~ "up",
        NES < 0 ~ "down",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ))
    top <- .top_by_direction(ranked, "direction", "padj", n = 10) |>
      dplyr::mutate(label = .trunc_label(pathway))
    top$label <- factor(top$label, levels = rev(unique(top$label)))
    p <- ggplot2::ggplot(top, ggplot2::aes(x = NES, y = label, fill = direction)) +
      ggplot2::geom_col() +
      ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = c(up = "#c0392b", down = "#2c7bb6")) +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey40") +
      ggplot2::labs(x = "NES", y = NULL,
                    title = sprintf("Top 10 up / Top 10 down %s gene sets (by padj)", grp)) +
      ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
      ggplot2::theme(
        axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
        plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(6, 10, 6, 6)
      )
    print(p)
    cat("\n\n")

    show_df <- ranked |>
      .top_by_direction("direction", "padj", n = 10) |>
      dplyr::select(dplyr::any_of(c("collection", "pathway", "NES",
                                    "pval", "padj", "size", "leadingEdge")))
    dt <- report_table(
      show_df,
      rownames = FALSE,
      filter   = "top",
      options  = list(
        pageLength = 20,
        lengthMenu = c(10, 20, 50, 100),
        scrollX = TRUE,
        autoWidth = FALSE,
        dom = "lfrtip",
        columnDefs = list(
          list(targets = which(names(show_df) == "pathway") - 1,
               className = "pathway-name-column")
        )
      ),
      signif_cols = intersect(c("NES", "pval", "padj"), names(show_df)),
      digits  = 3
    )
    cat(knitr::knit_print(dt))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
  if (is_html_report() && length(nonempty_grps) > 0) {
    cat("\n\n:::\n\n")
  }
}
```

### ORA (supplementary)

```{r enr-ora, results='asis', fig.width=9, fig.height=11}
de_path <- file.path(project_root, "results", "de", cid, "deseq2_results.csv")
de_for_ora <- safe_read(de_path)
ora_de_cfg <- cfg$de %||% list()
ora_cfg <- cfg$enrichment$ora %||% list()
ora_primary <- ora_de_cfg$primary %||% list(padj = 0.05, abs_lfc = 1)
ora_secondary <- ora_de_cfg$secondary %||% list(padj = 0.10, abs_lfc = 0.5)
ora_min_genes <- ora_cfg$min_input_genes %||% 100
ora_max_genes <- ora_cfg$max_input_genes %||% 500

.ora_candidates <- function(de_tbl, tier_name, cutoff) {
  if (is.null(de_tbl) || nrow(de_tbl) == 0) return(de_tbl[0, , drop = FALSE])
  de_tbl |>
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(padj),
      !is.na(log2FoldChange),
      padj < cutoff$padj,
      abs(log2FoldChange) >= cutoff$abs_lfc,
      !is.na(gene_name),
      nzchar(as.character(gene_name))
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(tier = tier_name)
}

ora_input_genes <- NULL
ora_input_tier <- NA_character_
if (!is.null(de_for_ora) && nrow(de_for_ora) > 0) {
  prim_ora <- .ora_candidates(de_for_ora, "primary", ora_primary)
  sec_ora  <- .ora_candidates(de_for_ora, "secondary", ora_secondary)
  if (nrow(prim_ora) >= ora_min_genes) {
    ora_input_genes <- prim_ora
    ora_input_tier <- "primary"
  } else if (nrow(sec_ora) >= ora_min_genes) {
    ora_input_genes <- sec_ora
    ora_input_tier <- "secondary"
  } else {
    ora_input_genes <- prim_ora[0, , drop = FALSE]
  }
  if (!is.null(ora_input_genes) && nrow(ora_input_genes) > ora_max_genes) {
    ora_input_genes <- ora_input_genes |>
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(log2FoldChange))) |>
      dplyr::slice_head(n = ora_max_genes)
  }
  if (!is.null(ora_input_genes) && nrow(ora_input_genes) > 0) {
    ora_input_genes <- ora_input_genes |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        direction = dplyr::case_when(
          log2FoldChange > 0 ~ "up",
          log2FoldChange < 0 ~ "down",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
      ) |>
      dplyr::filter(direction %in% c("up", "down")) |>
      dplyr::group_by(direction) |>
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(log2FoldChange)), .by_group = TRUE) |>
      dplyr::mutate(input_rank = dplyr::row_number()) |>
      dplyr::ungroup() |>
      dplyr::select(dplyr::any_of(c(
        "direction", "input_rank", "tier", "gene_id", "gene_name",
        "log2FoldChange", "padj"
      )))
  }
}

if (is_html_report()) {
  cat("\n\n<details>\n")
  cat("<summary><strong>ORA input gene list</strong></summary>\n\n")
} else {
  cat("\n\n#### ORA input gene list\n\n")
}
if (is.null(ora_input_genes) || nrow(ora_input_genes) == 0) {
  cat(as.character(no_results(sprintf(
    "No ORA input gene list selected: primary and secondary tiers both yielded fewer than %d genes.",
    ora_min_genes
  ))))
  cat("\n\n")
} else {
  gene_counts <- table(factor(ora_input_genes$direction, levels = c("up", "down")))
  caption <- sprintf(
    "ORA input genes: %s tier, %d total (%d up, %d down)",
    ora_input_tier,
    nrow(ora_input_genes),
    as.integer(gene_counts[["up"]] %||% 0),
    as.integer(gene_counts[["down"]] %||% 0)
  )
  dt <- report_table(
    ora_input_genes,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    caption = caption,
    options = list(
      pageLength = 25,
      lengthMenu = c(25, 50, 100, 250, 500),
      scrollX = TRUE,
      autoWidth = FALSE,
      dom = "lfrtip"
    ),
    signif_cols = intersect(c("log2FoldChange", "padj"), names(ora_input_genes)),
    digits = 3
  )
  cat(knitr::knit_print(dt))
  cat("\n\n")
}
if (is_html_report()) cat("\n</details>\n\n")

cat("\n\n#### ORA enrichment results\n\n")
ora_path <- file.path(project_root, "results", "enrichment", cid, "ora_combined.csv")
ora <- safe_read(ora_path)
if (is.null(ora) || nrow(ora) == 0) {
  cat(as.character(no_results("ORA returned no results (insufficient DEG or empty output).")))
} else {
  ora_dbs <- unique(as.character(ora$database))
  ora_dbs <- ora_dbs[!is.na(ora_dbs) & nzchar(ora_dbs)]

  if (is_html_report() && length(ora_dbs) > 0) {
    cat("\n\n::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n")
  }

  for (db in ora_dbs) {
    ora_db <- ora |> dplyr::filter(database == db)
    if (nrow(ora_db) == 0) next
    cat(sprintf("\n\n##### %s\n\n", db))

    show_df <- ora_db |>
      dplyr::filter(direction %in% c("up", "down")) |>
      dplyr::group_by(direction) |>
      dplyr::arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE) |>
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 10) |>
      dplyr::ungroup() |>
      dplyr::select(dplyr::any_of(c("direction", "tier", "ID",
                                    "Description", "GeneRatio", "BgRatio",
                                    "pvalue", "p.adjust", "qvalue", "Count")))

    bars <- show_df |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        neglog10p = -log10(pmax(p.adjust, 1e-300)),
        Description = ifelse(is.na(Description) | !nzchar(as.character(Description)),
                             as.character(ID), as.character(Description)),
        Description = ifelse(nchar(Description) > 50,
                             paste0(substr(Description, 1, 49), "..."),
                             Description)
      )
    if (nrow(bars) > 0) {
      p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
          bars,
          ggplot2::aes(x = neglog10p,
                       y = reorder(Description, neglog10p),
                       fill = direction)) +
        ggplot2::geom_col(position = ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
        ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = c(up = "#c0392b", down = "#2c7bb6")) +
        ggplot2::labs(x = "-log10(p.adjust)", y = NULL,
                      title = sprintf("Top 10 up / Top 10 down %s terms (by p.adjust)", db)) +
        ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
        ggplot2::theme(
          axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
          plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(6, 15, 6, 15)
        )
      print(p)
      cat("\n\n")
    }

    dt <- report_table(
      show_df,
      rownames = FALSE,
      filter   = "top",
      options  = list(
        pageLength = 20,
        lengthMenu = c(10, 20, 50, 100),
        scrollX = TRUE,
        autoWidth = FALSE,
        dom = "lfrtip",
        columnDefs = list(
          list(targets = which(names(show_df) == "Description") - 1,
               className = "pathway-name-column")
        )
      ),
      signif_cols = intersect(c("pvalue", "p.adjust", "qvalue"), names(show_df)),
      digits  = 3
    )
    cat(knitr::knit_print(dt))
    cat("\n\n")
  }

  if (is_html_report() && length(ora_dbs) > 0) {
    cat("\n\n:::\n\n")
  }
}
```

### TF activity (CollecTRI, ULM)

```{r enr-tf-activity, results='asis', fig.width=8, fig.height=9}
tf_path <- file.path(project_root, "results", "tf_activity", cid, "tf_scores.tsv")
tf <- safe_read(tf_path, sep = "\t")
if (is.null(tf) || nrow(tf) == 0) {
  cat(as.character(no_results("TF activity output is empty (network fetch may have failed).")))
} else {
  tf_top <- tf |>
    dplyr::mutate(abs_s = abs(score)) |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs_s)) |>
    head(30) |>
    dplyr::mutate(source = factor(source, levels = rev(source)))
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(tf_top,
          ggplot2::aes(x = score, y = source,
                       fill = ifelse(score > 0, "up", "down"))) +
    ggplot2::geom_col() +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = c(up = "#c0392b", down = "#2c7bb6"),
                               name = "direction") +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey40") +
    ggplot2::labs(x = "ULM score", y = NULL,
                  title = "Top 30 TFs by |score|") +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
      plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(6, 10, 6, 6)
    )
  print(p)
  cat("\n\n")

  show_df <- tf |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(score))) |>
    head(200)
  dt <- report_table(
    show_df, rownames = FALSE, filter = "top",
    options  = list(pageLength = 10, lengthMenu = c(10, 25, 50, 100), scrollX = TRUE, dom = "lfrtip"),
    signif_cols = intersect(c("score", "p_value"), names(show_df)),
    digits  = 3
  )
  cat(knitr::knit_print(dt))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

### Pathway activity (PROGENy)

::: {.lang-en}
PROGENy scores are per-sample signature activity, not fold changes. Each pathway has its own baseline magnitude, so the heatmap is z-scored per pathway across samples, with the **treated vs control delta** reported separately.
:::

::: {.lang-ko}
PROGENy score는 샘플별 signature 활성 추정치(fold change 아님). Pathway별 baseline 규모가 달라 heatmap은 pathway 단위로 샘플 간 z-score를 적용하며, **treated vs control delta**를 별도로 요약합니다.
:::

```{r enr-progeny-heatmap, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=7}
pw_path <- file.path(project_root, "results", "pathway_activity", cid,
                     "progeny_scores.tsv")
pw <- safe_read(pw_path, sep = "\t")

crow <- contrast_row(cid)
num  <- if (is.null(crow)) NA else as.character(crow$numerator)
den  <- if (is.null(crow)) NA else as.character(crow$denominator)

sample_cond <- NULL
pw_mat <- NULL

if (is.null(pw) || nrow(pw) == 0 ||
    ncol(pw) < 2 ||
    all(vapply(pw[, -1, drop = FALSE], function(x) all(is.na(x)), logical(1)))) {
  no_results("PROGENy scores unavailable or all-NA.")
} else {
  sample_col <- names(pw)[1]
  pw_mat <- as.matrix(pw[, -1, drop = FALSE])
  rownames(pw_mat) <- as.character(pw[[sample_col]])

  # Per-pathway z-score across samples. With n=3+3 the mean/sd are rough but
  # centering/scaling still uncouples baseline magnitude from treatment effect.
  z_mat <- scale(pw_mat)
  z_mat[is.na(z_mat)] <- 0

  # Order pathways by |mean(num) - mean(den)| on z-scores so the rows most
  # responsive to the contrast float to the top of the heatmap.
  cond_lookup <- setNames(as.character(samples$condition),
                          as.character(samples$sample))
  sample_cond <- cond_lookup[rownames(z_mat)]
  num_rows <- which(sample_cond == num)
  den_rows <- which(sample_cond == den)

  order_metric <- if (length(num_rows) > 0 && length(den_rows) > 0) {
    abs(colMeans(z_mat[num_rows, , drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE) -
        colMeans(z_mat[den_rows, , drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE))
  } else {
    apply(z_mat, 2, function(x) diff(range(x, na.rm = TRUE)))
  }
  path_order <- names(sort(order_metric, decreasing = TRUE))

  long <- as.data.frame(as.table(z_mat))
  names(long) <- c("sample", "pathway", "z")
  long$sample  <- factor(long$sample,  levels = rownames(z_mat))
  long$pathway <- factor(long$pathway, levels = rev(path_order))

  lim <- max(abs(long$z), na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(lim) || lim == 0) lim <- 1

  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(long,
          ggplot2::aes(x = sample, y = pathway, fill = z)) +
    ggplot2::geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "#2c7bb6", mid = "white", high = "#d7191c",
      midpoint = 0, limits = c(-lim, lim), na.value = "grey90",
      name = "z-score"
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
                  title = "PROGENy activity, z-scored per pathway",
                  subtitle = "Rows sorted by |Δ| between contrast groups") +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10),
      plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(6, 10, 12, 10)
    )
  p
}
```

#### Treated vs control delta (raw scale) + Wilcoxon p

```{r enr-progeny-delta}
if (is.null(pw) || nrow(pw) == 0 || ncol(pw) < 2 ||
    is.na(num) || is.na(den) ||
    !length(which(sample_cond == num)) ||
    !length(which(sample_cond == den))) {
  no_results("Delta table not computable (missing contrast or group members).")
} else {
  num_idx <- which(sample_cond == num)
  den_idx <- which(sample_cond == den)
  stats_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(colnames(pw_mat), function(path) {
    a <- pw_mat[num_idx, path]
    b <- pw_mat[den_idx, path]
    delta <- mean(a, na.rm = TRUE) - mean(b, na.rm = TRUE)
    pool_sd <- stats::sd(c(a, b), na.rm = TRUE)
    effect_size <- if (is.finite(pool_sd) && pool_sd > 0) delta / pool_sd else NA_real_
    pw_p <- tryCatch(
      stats::wilcox.test(a, b, exact = FALSE)$p.value,
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    )
    data.frame(pathway = path, delta = delta, effect_size = effect_size,
               wilcox_p = pw_p, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }))
  stats_df$wilcox_padj <- stats::p.adjust(stats_df$wilcox_p, method = "BH")
  stats_df <- stats_df[order(abs(stats_df$delta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  rownames(stats_df) <- NULL

  dt <- report_table(
    stats_df,
    rownames = FALSE,
    caption  = sprintf("PROGENy pathway activity: %s minus %s (n=%d vs %d)",
                       num, den, length(num_idx), length(den_idx)),
    options  = list(pageLength = 14, lengthMenu = c(14, 25, 50, 100), dom = "lfrtip", scrollX = TRUE),
    signif_cols = c("delta", "effect_size", "wilcox_p", "wilcox_padj"),
    digits  = 3
  )
  dt
}
```


)---"
````

```{r enr-render, results='asis'}
if (nrow(contrasts) == 0) {
  print(no_results("No contrasts defined in contrasts.tsv."))
}

for (cid in contrasts$contrast_id) {
  env <- new.env(parent = globalenv())
  env$cid          <- cid
  env$project_root <- project_root
  env$safe_read    <- safe_read
  env$no_results   <- no_results
  env$`%||%`       <- `%||%`

  out <- knitr::knit_child(
    text  = enr_child_template,
    envir = env,
    quiet = TRUE
  )
  cat(out, sep = "\n")
}
```
